description: Blue printed backpackOne haul loop, two padded and adjustable shoulder strapsTwo main zip compartments, one has a padded laptop sleeve with Velcro closure and the other has one slip pocket, a zipped mesh pocket and pen holdersA zip pocket on the frontTwo mesh stash pockets on one sidesToggle string detail at the frontPadded backPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects
